name: pitchdocs
description: Generate high-quality public-facing repository documentation with a marketing edge.

skills.name: api-reference
skills.description: Guidance for setting up API reference documentation generators — TypeDoc, Sphinx, godoc, and rustdoc.

skills.name: changelog
skills.description: Generates user-friendly changelogs from git history using conventional commits.

skills.name: doc-refresh
skills.description: Orchestrates documentation updates after version bumps, feature additions, or periodic maintenance.

skills.name: docs-verify
skills.description: Validates documentation quality and freshness — checks for broken links, stale content, and badge URLs.

skills.name: feature-benefits
skills.description: Systematic codebase scanning for features and evidence-based feature-to-benefit translation.

skills.name: geo-optimisation
skills.description: Generative Engine Optimisation patterns for documentation that surfaces in AI-generated answers.

skills.name: launch-artifacts
skills.description: Transforms README and CHANGELOG into Dev.to articles, HN posts, Reddit posts, and Twitter threads.

skills.name: llms-txt
skills.description: Generates llms.txt and llms-full.txt following the llmstxt.org specification.

skills.name: package-registry
skills.description: Documentation guidance for npm and PyPI — metadata fields, cross-renderer compatibility, provenance.

skills.name: pitchdocs-suite
skills.description: One-command generation and audit of the full public repository documentation set.

skills.name: platform-profiles
skills.description: Platform-specific equivalents for GitLab and Bitbucket — file paths, badges, CI/CD, CLI tools.

skills.name: public-readme
skills.description: Generates READMEs with the Daytona/Banesullivan marketing framework — hero, features, quickstart, CTAs.

skills.name: roadmap
skills.description: Generates ROADMAP.md from project milestones, issues, and boards.

skills.name: user-guides
skills.description: Generates task-oriented user guides and how-to documentation.

skills.name: visual-standards
skills.description: Visual formatting standards — emoji headings, screenshots, image optimisation.

commands.name: readme
commands.description: Generate or update a marketing-friendly README.md

commands.name: features
commands.description: Extract features and benefits from a codebase

commands.name: changelog
commands.description: Generate or update CHANGELOG.md from git history

commands.name: roadmap
commands.description: Generate or update ROADMAP.md from milestones and issues

commands.name: docs-audit
commands.description: Audit repository documentation completeness and quality

commands.name: docs-verify
commands.description: Verify documentation quality, links, freshness, and consistency

commands.name: launch
commands.description: Generate platform-specific launch and promotion artifacts

commands.name: llms-txt
commands.description: Generate llms.txt and llms-full.txt for LLM-friendly content curation

commands.name: user-guide
commands.description: Generate user guide documentation for the repository

commands.name: platform
commands.description: Detect hosting platform and report PitchDocs feature support

commands.name: doc-refresh
commands.description: Refresh documentation after version bumps or periodic maintenance

commands.name: geo
commands.description: Load GEO optimisation patterns for AI citation

commands.name: visual-standards
commands.description: Load visual formatting standards for screenshots and emoji headings

commands.name: activate
commands.description: Install, uninstall, or check status of PitchDocs per-project features

agents.name: docs-writer
agents.description: Orchestrates documentation generation via a research-write-review pipeline.

agents.name: docs-researcher
agents.description: Codebase discovery and feature extraction for documentation generation.

agents.name: docs-reviewer
agents.description: Post-generation quality validation with scoring rubric.

agents.name: docs-freshness
agents.description: Read-only freshness checker with command suggestions.

rules.name: doc-standards
rules.description: Quality standards — 4-question framework, progressive disclosure, benefit-driven language, banned phrases.

rules.name: docs-awareness
rules.description: Documentation trigger map — suggests PitchDocs commands at documentation moments.

rules.name: content-filter
rules.description: Content filter quick reference — risk levels, fetch commands, chunked writing for high-risk OSS files.
